name: Chocolate Zucchini Rum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, one at a time.
3. Stir in zucchini and rum.
4. Mix together flour, walnuts, chocolate, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
5. Stir the flour mixture and milk into the egg mixture.
6. Pour batter into a well-buttered and floured 10-inch tube pan or ridged pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes.
8. Cool in the pan on a rack for 15 minutes.
9. Invert the cake onto a plate and let cool.
